name: HDFC Bank PIXEL Play Credit Card
exclusions: purchases converted to EMI post facto
payment of card fees and other charges
milestoneBenefits: Joining fee waiver on spending Rs 20,000 within 90 days of issuance
Renewal fee waived on spending Rs 1 lakh or more in the preceding 12 months
additionalBenefits: Choose any two 5% cashback packs: Dining & Entertainment, Travel, Grocery, Electronics, or Fashion
Choose one 3% cashback ecommerce platform: Amazon, Flipkart, or PayZapp
1% cashback on UPI spends for PIXEL RuPay Credit Card holders
Manage card, rewards, EMI, statements, repayments, disputes, and controls through PayZapp
Choose billing date, merchant partners, and card colour
1% fuel surcharge waiver at fuel stations across India on transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle

selfEmployed: Annual ITR greater than Rs 6 lakh
